hero.title: About HASCO Group
hero.subtitle: Excellence in integrated solutions across marine, logistics, and development sectors with 19+ years of proven expertise.

story.heading: Our Story
story.paragraph1: HASCO Group was established in 2005 to practice in the activities of integrated supply chain & logistics solutions.
story.paragraph2: HASCO Group has created an active ecosystem of maritime and logistics services: from ship agency and marine operations to freight forwarding and hospitality services across the Middle East and beyond.
story.paragraph3: With over 19 years of excellence in integrated supply chain and logistics solutions, HASCO Group stands as a trusted partner in Saudi Arabia's economic growth and development.

shipAgency.title: Ship Agency
shipAgency.description: Professional ship agency services providing comprehensive port operations and vessel handling with advanced maritime expertise.

shipping.title: Shipping (NVOCC)
shipping.description: Global shipping solutions and cargo management across international routes with comprehensive logistics support.

marine.title: Marine Operations
marine.description: Comprehensive marine services including consultancy, operations, and professional diving with state-of-the-art equipment.

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.description: High-quality hospitality, catering, and event management services with premium facilities and experienced coordinators.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.text: To deliver exceptional integrated solutions across marine, logistics, and development sectors, fostering sustainable growth and innovation while maintaining the highest standards of service excellence.

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the leading integrated solutions provider in the Middle East, recognized for our commitment to excellence, innovation, and sustainable development practices.

cta.heading: Ready to Work With Us?
cta.text: Let's discuss how HASCO Group can support your next project with our comprehensive solutions and expertise.

hero.title: Our Sectors
hero.subtitle: Six specialized divisions working in unison to deliver integrated solutions across the Kingdom and beyond.

intro.heading: Diversified Expertise
intro.text: From the Red Sea coast to the Arabian Gulf, HASCO's six core sectors form an interconnected ecosystem. Each division draws on shared capabilities and deep local knowledge to deliver outcomes that stand apart.

tourismEvents.title: Tourism & Events
tourismEvents.description: HASCO is at the forefront of Saudi Arabia's tourism revolution, supporting destination development and delivering world-class event experiences across the Kingdom's most iconic venues and emerging destinations.

detail.tagline: Helping the Kingdom welcome the world, from headline events to the destinations being built to host them.
overview: Saudi Arabia has set out to become one of the most visited countries in the world, and that ambition runs through everything our tourism and events team does. We work alongside destination developers, government bodies, and private operators to turn plans on paper into places and experiences that visitors genuinely enjoy.

Our involvement covers the full arc of an event or a destination: early planning and feasibility, on-the-ground logistics, staffing and supplier coordination, and the day-to-day operations that keep guests comfortable. Whether the setting is a coastal resort still under development or a city venue hosting tens of thousands, the goal stays the same, which is a visit that feels effortless to the person living it.

capabilities.title: Destination development support
capabilities.text: We support tourism developers through the practical side of bringing a destination to life, coordinating the trades, services, and people needed before the first guest arrives.

capabilities.title: Event planning and delivery
capabilities.text: From concept through to closing night, we plan and run events of every size, handling venues, scheduling, vendors, and the contingencies that large gatherings always bring.

capabilities.title: Festivals and cultural programming
capabilities.text: We coordinate festivals and cultural events that draw large crowds, balancing local character with the operational discipline these moments demand.

capabilities.title: Visitor experience and operations
capabilities.text: We design and manage the touchpoints a guest moves through, from arrival and wayfinding to hospitality and departure, so the experience holds together from start to finish.

approach: Events are unforgiving about timing, so we plan backwards from the moment the doors open and build in the margin to absorb surprises. Local knowledge matters here as much as logistics, and our teams know how the Kingdom's venues, regulations, and seasons shape what is possible.
We also stay close to Saudi Arabia's wider tourism goals under Vision 2030. The work we take on is meant to last beyond a single season and contribute to destinations that keep drawing people back.
highlights: Support for new and developing destinations across the Kingdom
Events from intimate gatherings to large public programs
On-site teams who manage the experience in real time

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.description: From remote project camps to luxury resorts, HASCO delivers hospitality, catering, and integrated facility management, covering the food, accommodation, cleaning, and upkeep that keep a site running and its people looked after in even the most challenging environments.

detail.tagline: Catering, accommodation, and facility management that keep a site running and its people looked after, from a city hotel to a remote project camp.
overview: Hospitality is often judged by its hardest moments, and many of ours take place far from the nearest city. HASCO provides catering, accommodation, and the full range of facility services for clients whose people work in remote locations, alongside support for resorts and venues that expect a refined level of care.

The thread that connects a luxury resort, a desert work camp, and the buildings we keep running is consistency. People deserve good food, clean and comfortable surroundings, and staff who pay attention, wherever the site sits. We build our operations around that expectation rather than around the convenience of the location.

capabilities.title: Catering and food services
capabilities.text: We run catering operations that handle large daily volumes without losing quality, with menus built around the people we are feeding and the conditions on site.

capabilities.title: Camp management and accommodation
capabilities.text: We set up and manage accommodation for project workforces, covering provisioning, housekeeping, maintenance, and the everyday services that make a camp livable over months at a time.

capabilities.title: Guest and concierge services
capabilities.text: For resorts and high-profile guests, we provide attentive front-of-house and concierge support tuned to what each visitor expects.

capabilities.title: Remote site hospitality
capabilities.text: We specialize in standing up full hospitality operations at mega-project sites where almost nothing exists when we arrive.

capabilities.title: Facility operations and maintenance
capabilities.text: We keep buildings running with mechanical, electrical, HVAC, and water-system maintenance, both planned and preventive, so facilities stay safe and operational.

capabilities.title: Cleaning and housekeeping
capabilities.text: We handle professional cleaning, housekeeping, laundry, and waste management across civil and industrial spaces, from daily upkeep to specialized deep cleans.

capabilities.title: Grounds, pest control, and EHS
capabilities.text: We cover landscaping, pest control and disinfection, and environment, health, and safety compliance to keep sites healthy and well kept.

capabilities.title: Security services
capabilities.text: We provide manned guarding, access control, surveillance, and round-the-clock monitoring to keep people and assets protected.

approach: Hospitality and facility work both live or die on supply and planning. We secure provisions, manage storage, and keep kitchens, accommodation, and building systems running in places where a missed delivery cannot simply be fixed the next day.
Safety and hygiene sit at the center of how we operate. Our teams follow the standards that large clients and their auditors expect, documented and ready for inspection at any time.
highlights: Catering, cleaning, maintenance, and security from a single provider
Experience supporting the Kingdom's giga-project workforces
Hygiene and safety standards held to client audit requirements

construction.title: Construction
construction.description: HASCO's construction division covers the built environment from the ground up, from property development and planning to civil infrastructure and the construction of permanent facilities. We deliver for some of the Kingdom's most ambitious projects, from coastal resorts to industrial complexes.

detail.tagline: Property development, civil works, and facility construction for the Kingdom's most demanding projects, from the ground up.
overview: Our construction division covers the built environment from the ground up. We develop property, lay the infrastructure and civil works that make a site usable, and raise the buildings that stand long after handover. Much of this work happens at coastal developments and industrial sites where conditions are difficult and tolerances are tight.

We act as a developer, a general contractor, and a project manager, which means we can carry a project from land and early planning through to completion, or step into a defined scope within a larger program. Either way the responsibility is the same, which is to deliver work that is safe, sound, and finished on the terms agreed.

capabilities.title: Property and development
capabilities.text: We develop real estate and built assets from the ground up, taking a project through planning, design, and build to a finished, operational property.

capabilities.title: Infrastructure and civil works
capabilities.text: We deliver the earthworks, roads, utilities, and structural civil works that form the backbone of larger developments.

capabilities.title: General contracting
capabilities.text: We manage builds end to end, coordinating subcontractors, materials, and schedules against a clear plan and budget.

capabilities.title: Project management
capabilities.text: We bring planning, cost control, and oversight to projects, keeping the many moving parts aligned and accountable.

capabilities.title: Temporary and permanent facilities
capabilities.text: We construct both the temporary facilities a project needs while it is underway and the permanent buildings it is judged by once complete.

capabilities.title: Quality and safety
capabilities.text: We hold our sites to defined quality and safety standards, with the checks and documentation to prove it.

approach: Construction tends to go wrong in the gaps between trades and decisions, so we put our effort into planning and coordination before the first machine moves. A well-sequenced site is a safer and a faster one.

We treat safety as a daily practice rather than a policy on a wall. Our supervisors are accountable for the conditions their crews work in, and we would rather pause to fix a hazard than carry it forward.
highlights: Infrastructure and facilities for coastal and industrial developments
General contracting and project management under one roof
Documented quality assurance and on-site safety

supplyChain.title: Supply Chain
supplyChain.description: Our end-to-end supply chain management ensures the right materials arrive at the right place, at the right time. We handle everything from procurement and warehousing to distribution across the Kingdom.

detail.tagline: Procurement, warehousing, and distribution that put the right materials where they are needed, when they are needed.
overview: A project can stall on something as small as a missing part, which is why supply chain work rarely gets noticed until it fails. Our role is to make sure it does not. We manage the flow of materials from the supplier all the way to the point of use, across distances and terrain that make that harder than it sounds.

We handle the parts of the chain that clients would rather not run themselves: finding and managing vendors, holding and tracking inventory, and moving goods the last stretch to a site. Done well, this work is quiet, predictable, and easy to plan around.

capabilities.title: Procurement and vendor management
capabilities.text: We source materials and manage the suppliers behind them, negotiating terms and holding vendors to their delivery and quality commitments.

capabilities.title: Warehousing and inventory
capabilities.text: We store and track inventory with the visibility clients need to know what they have and where it is at any moment.

capabilities.title: Distribution and last-mile delivery
capabilities.text: We move goods across the Kingdom and handle the final leg to sites that are often remote and hard to reach.

capabilities.title: Optimization and analytics
capabilities.text: We look for the waste and delay hidden in a supply chain and use data to tighten it over time.

approach: We design each supply chain around the project it serves rather than forcing every client through the same template. A coastal resort and an inland industrial site have very different needs, and the plan should reflect that.
Visibility is what lets a client trust a supply chain, so we keep our reporting clear and current. When something does go wrong, the people who need to know find out early enough to act.
highlights: End-to-end management from procurement to last-mile delivery
Inventory visibility clients can plan around
Distribution to remote sites across Saudi Arabia

marine.title: Marine
marine.description: HASCO's maritime expertise spans the Red Sea and Arabian Gulf, providing critical ship agency, marine consultancy, and professional diving services that keep port operations and offshore projects running smoothly.

detail.tagline: Ship agency, marine consultancy, and commercial diving that keep ports and offshore projects moving on both of the Kingdom's coasts.
overview: Saudi Arabia sits between two busy seas, and HASCO works on both. Our marine division supports vessels and offshore operations across the Red Sea and the Arabian Gulf, handling the practical needs of ships in port and the specialized work that happens at and below the waterline.

Marine operations run on tight schedules and unforgiving conditions. A vessel waiting in port costs money by the hour, and offshore work leaves little room for error. Our teams are built to handle both, with the local relationships and technical skill these jobs require.

capabilities.title: Ship agency and port operations
capabilities.text: We act as agents for vessels calling at Saudi ports, managing clearances, berthing, supplies, and the coordination that gets a ship in and out without delay.

capabilities.title: Marine consultancy and surveys
capabilities.text: We provide marine consultancy and conduct surveys that give owners and operators a clear, independent picture of condition and risk.

capabilities.title: Commercial diving
capabilities.text: Our professional divers carry out the inspection, maintenance, and underwater tasks that keep marine assets safe and operational.

capabilities.title: Marine support, onshore and offshore
capabilities.text: We supply the support services that offshore and coastal projects depend on, from logistics to personnel.

approach: Port work rewards people who know the local system, and ours do. That familiarity with harbors, authorities, and the rhythm of each port is often the difference between a smooth call and a stalled one.
For diving and offshore work we hold to recognized safety procedures without exception. The conditions are too serious to treat any other way, and our crews are trained and equipped accordingly.
highlights: Coverage across the Red Sea and the Arabian Gulf
Established relationships at the Kingdom's ports
Certified commercial diving and survey teams

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.description: Connecting Saudi Arabia to global trade networks, HASCO's logistics division provides freight forwarding, customs brokerage, and transportation management with the precision and reliability that major projects demand.
logistics.feature1: Freight forwarding by air, sea, and land

detail.tagline: Freight forwarding, customs clearance, and transport that connect Saudi projects to global trade without the friction.
overview: Moving goods into and across Saudi Arabia involves more than a truck and a route. It means coordinating carriers, clearing customs, and managing the paperwork that international trade runs on, all without losing time the project cannot spare. Our logistics division handles that complexity so clients can plan around firm dates rather than hope.

We move freight by air, sea, and land, and we manage the handoffs between them, which is usually where shipments get stuck. From a single urgent consignment to the steady flow of materials a long project needs, we treat each shipment as something a deadline depends on.

capabilities.title: Freight forwarding
capabilities.text: We arrange freight by air, sea, and land, choosing the route and mode that fit the cargo, the budget, and the timeline.

capabilities.title: Customs brokerage and clearance
capabilities.text: We manage customs clearance and the documentation behind it, keeping shipments compliant and moving.

capabilities.title: Transportation management
capabilities.text: We plan and oversee transport across the Kingdom, coordinating fleets and schedules to keep goods on track.

capabilities.title: NVOCC shipping
capabilities.text: We offer NVOCC shipping solutions, giving clients the benefits of a carrier relationship without the overhead of running one.

approach: Customs and documentation cause more delays than distance ever does, so we get the paperwork right the first time and stay current on rules that change. A cleared shipment is a moving shipment.

We keep clients informed across every leg of a journey, because a shipment people can see is one they can plan around. When a route is disrupted, we find the alternative rather than waiting for the problem to clear itself.
highlights: Air, sea, and land freight under one coordinated plan
NVOCC solutions for regular shipping needs

cta.text: Whether it's a single sector or an integrated multi-sector engagement, HASCO has the expertise to deliver. Let's discuss your requirements.

detailCommon.otherSectorsText: Six divisions, one team. See how the rest of HASCO fits together.

intro.heading: Strategic Partnerships
intro.text: HASCO's client relationships are built on trust, performance, and shared ambition. We are proud to support organizations that are shaping the future of Saudi Arabia under Vision 2030.

neom.description: Supporting the world's most ambitious smart city with marine infrastructure, logistics coordination, and comprehensive port operations along the NEOM coastline.

redSeaGlobal.description: Enabling sustainable luxury tourism through integrated maritime services, hospitality support, and supply chain management for the Red Sea development.

amaala.description: Delivering comprehensive logistics and operational support for the ultra-luxury coastal destination, ensuring seamless construction and development progress.

saudiAramco.name: Saudi Aramco
saudiAramco.description: Providing marine operations, supply chain solutions, and specialized logistics services for the world's leading energy company across key Saudi ports.

tronox.name: Tronox
tronox.description: Supporting mineral operations with port logistics, marine services, and supply chain management at Ras Al Khair and other strategic industrial locations.

partnership.heading: Powering Vision 2030
partnership.text: Every partnership we enter is a commitment to the Kingdom's future. Our clients trust us because we deliver — on time, on budget, and to the highest standards.

cta.heading: Become a Partner
cta.text: Join the roster of organizations that trust HASCO to deliver. Let's explore how we can support your next project.

hero.title: Get In Touch
hero.subtitle: Whether you have a question, a project in mind, or want to explore partnership opportunities — we're here to help.

form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent. Our team will get back to you shortly.

offices.heading: Our Offices Across the Kingdom
offices.text: HASCO maintains a strategic presence at key ports and industrial zones throughout Saudi Arabia, ensuring responsive service wherever our clients operate.

hero.title: Careers at HASCO
hero.subtitle: Be part of the team building Saudi Arabia's future. Join a company where your work shapes mega-projects and drives Vision 2030.

why.heading: Why HASCO?
why.text: At HASCO, you don't just fill a role — you contribute to projects that are redefining the Kingdom. From NEOM's coastline to the Red Sea's luxury resorts, our people are at the heart of Saudi Arabia's transformation.
why.benefit1Desc: Contribute directly to NEOM, Red Sea Global, AMAALA, and other Vision 2030 developments that are shaping the world.
why.benefit2Desc: Access structured career paths, training programs, and mentorship from industry leaders across six specialized sectors.
why.benefit3Desc: Work alongside a multinational team across marine, logistics, construction, hospitality, tourism, and supply chain sectors.
why.benefit4Desc: Enjoy competitive compensation, comprehensive benefits, and the opportunity to grow with a rapidly expanding organization.

openings.heading: Current Openings
openings.text: We're always looking for talented professionals who share our drive for excellence.

cta.heading: Don't See Your Role?
cta.text: We're always interested in exceptional talent. Send us your CV and we'll reach out when the right opportunity arises.

hero.subtitle: From marine expertise to logistics, construction, tourism, and beyond — HASCO delivers world-class solutions that power the Kingdom's growth and global ambitions.

about.heading: About
about.description: HASCO has grown from a focused logistics provider into a diversified holding group. Based in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, we operate across Marine, Logistics, Construction, Shipping, Tourism, Hospitality, and Consultancy, supporting the nation's transformation under Vision 2030.

ceo.name: Hasan Alharbi
ceo.title: Chief Executive Officer
ceo.heading: A Message from Our CEO
ceo.note: At HASCO, we believe in the power of integrated solutions. Our journey from a focused logistics provider to a diversified holding group reflects the Kingdom's own transformation. As Saudi Arabia strides boldly toward Vision 2030, we're honored to contribute our expertise across marine, logistics, construction, and beyond. Every project we undertake is a testament to our commitment to excellence and our faith in the Kingdom's future.

destinations.label: HASCO OFFICES
destinations.subtitle: HASCO operates across key strategic locations throughout the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia

magna.name: Magna
magna.description: Magna represents HASCO's presence in the northern Red Sea region, supporting development projects and marine operations in this emerging area. Our services include logistics coordination and marine consultancy for regional infrastructure projects.

diba.name: Diba
diba.description: Located along the Red Sea coast, Diba is a key location for HASCO's marine and logistics operations, supporting coastal development and maritime activities in the region.

alWajh.name: Al Wajh
alWajh.description: Al Wajh serves as a strategic gateway for HASCO's operations supporting NEOM and Red Sea development projects. We provide ship agency, marine operations, and comprehensive logistics solutions for this rapidly growing region.

yanbu.name: Yanbu
yanbu.description: Yanbu is one of Saudi Arabia's most important industrial ports on the Red Sea. HASCO delivers full-spectrum port services, including ship agency, cargo handling, freight forwarding, and marine operations support for the petrochemical and industrial sectors.

kap.name: KAP
kap.description: King Abdullah Port (KAP) is a major container port north of Jeddah. HASCO provides comprehensive maritime services, advanced logistics solutions, and strategic consultancy to support regional trade and economic growth.

jeddah.name: Jeddah
jeddah.description: Jeddah is HASCO's flagship location and operational headquarters. As Saudi Arabia's premier commercial port on the Red Sea, we provide comprehensive maritime services, advanced logistics solutions, and strategic consultancy to support the Kingdom's trade and economic growth.

jazan.name: Jazan
jazan.description: Jazan Port serves the southern region of Saudi Arabia with vital industrial and commercial activities. HASCO offers ship agency, marine operations, and integrated logistics services supporting the Jazan Economic City and regional development initiatives.

khafji.name: Khafji
khafji.description: Khafji, located in the northeast near the Kuwaiti border, is an important oil and gas production area. HASCO supports offshore and onshore operations with specialized marine services, logistics coordination, and consultancy for the energy sector.

rasAlKhair.name: Ras Al Khair
rasAlKhair.description: Ras Al Khair is a major industrial hub on Saudi Arabia's eastern coast, home to one of the world's largest aluminum smelters and a vital port for mineral exports. HASCO provides comprehensive marine operations, logistics support, and port agency services to facilitate seamless industrial operations in this strategic location.

dammam.name: Dammam
dammam.description: Dammam, the capital of the Eastern Province, hosts King Abdul Aziz Port - one of the largest ports in the Arabian Gulf. HASCO provides comprehensive maritime services, freight forwarding, and supply chain solutions supporting the region's thriving industrial and commercial sectors.

footer.description: Excellence in integrated solutions across marine, logistics, and development sectors. Powering Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 with 20+ years of proven expertise.
